prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: 26C-COOKTOOLS-PARENT-GREY-DISCOSKUS Product Type: FOOD_SPATULA Brand (from catalog): Beille Existing Title: Beille Grey Nylon Spoons Spatula Kitchen Utensils with Wooden Handles High Heat Resistance Description: Want to step up your cooking, baking and meal prep game? Then you need the 4pc Beille nylon kitchen utensils set that comes with x2 spoons, sold and slotted, as well as x2 spatulas, also solid and slotted, that feature a stylish wood and charcoal grey finish. These kitchen utensils are made with high heat resistant nylon that will stand up to all the wear and tear your kitchen dishes out.

The spatulas and spoons feature sturdy handles made of durable wood so you can count on them to last, and the ergonomic handle design with top soft grip will provide comfort and help prevent slippage during use. The handle features a slot for easy hanging storage if preferred to drawer.

Every kitchen needs a kitchen utensils set of reliable, durable, spoons and spatulas for baking and cooking. With the Beille high heat resistance nylon kitchen utensils set, you can cook, bake, serve and food prep in comfort and style for many meals to come. Search Terms: (none) Features: - 4PC KITCHEN UTENSILS SET: Beille's 4pc kitchen utensils spoons and spatula set are a must have kitchen starter set for cooking, baking, serving and food prep; Comfortable wooden handles and top soft grip will allow you to quickly and safely cook food while keeping your hands safe from heat === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Beille 4-pc Grey Nylon Spoons and Spatula Kitchen Utensils

tokens.name: Nylon Spoons and Spatula Kitchen Utensils
